title: staging_ngsadmix_q_v0 — loose capture of one NGSadmix Q matrix at K
description: Staging payload for the K-templated NGSadmix Q-matrix slot. Echoes K + the raw JSON the upstream pipeline wrote. Promote later (ngsadmix_q_v1) once the per-K shape is pinned (samples-by-K float matrix vs columns-by-K vs the embedded-table compact form).
